Thanks for contributing! A few notes before you submit:

- Branch name should follow `<type>/<short-description>` (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
- Commit messages should follow Conventional Commits.
- Coverage thresholds: server ≥ 85% (line & branch), web ≥ 75% (line & branch). CircleCI enforces this.
- Tests and docs belong in the same commit as the change they describe.
-->
